Ground Truth:
(x^3 - 3x) + y + z = 0

Component functions:
  g1(x) = x^3 - 3x
  g2(y) = y
  g3(z) = z


Fitted Equation:
(0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)*(1.1234391*(0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)**2 - 2.499525) + 0.716902984654221*y + 0.0194342920462114 + 0.716379542985553*z - 0.00407072326203848 = 0.0076
R²_ortho = 0.9983

Component functions:
  g1(x) = (0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)*(1.1234391*(0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)**2 - 2.499525)
  g2(y) = 0.716902984654221*y + 0.0194342920462114
  g3(z) = 0.716379542985553*z - 0.00407072326203848
